steps.eval: (() => { const l = document.querySelector('[data-testid=pin-label]'); if (!l) throw new Error('pin label not rendered on the map'); if (l.textContent.trim() !== 'House Sable') throw new Error('pin label text wrong: ' + l.textContent); const r = l.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width < 1 || r.height < 1) throw new Error('pin label not visible'); })()
(() => { if (document.querySelector('[data-testid=pin-label]')) throw new Error('pin labels still shown after toggling Show pin labels off'); })()

(() => { const pop = document.querySelector('[data-testid=share-popover]'); if (!pop) throw new Error('share popover missing'); const legend = document.querySelector('[data-testid=map-legend]'); if (legend && legend.open) throw new Error('opening Share should close the open dock panel'); const r = pop.getBoundingClientRect(); const cx = Math.round(r.left + r.width / 2); const cy = Math.round(r.top + r.height / 2); const top = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy); if (!top || (!pop.contains(top) && top !== pop)) throw new Error('share popover is not the topmost element at its centre — buried behind ' + (top && top.className)); })()

(() => { const w = document.querySelector('.map-zoom-wrapper'); const z = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(w).getPropertyValue('--zoom')); if (!(z > 1.01)) throw new Error('zoom-in did not scale the map: --zoom=' + z); })()

(() => { const d = document.querySelector('[data-testid=map-legend]'); if (!d || !d.open) throw new Error('map key did not open'); if (!d.querySelector('.key-swatch--royal')) throw new Error('legend swatches missing'); })()

(() => { const t = document.querySelector('[data-testid=royal-encampments] .info-panel-title'); if (!t) throw new Error('encampments chip title missing'); if (t.textContent.trim() !== 'Encampments') throw new Error('encampments chip label should read "Encampments", got: ' + t.textContent); if (t.scrollWidth > t.clientWidth + 1) throw new Error('encampments chip label is truncated: scrollWidth=' + t.scrollWidth + ' clientWidth=' + t.clientWidth); })()

(() => { const w = document.querySelector('.map-zoom-wrapper'); const z = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(w).getPropertyValue('--zoom')); if (!(z > 1.5)) throw new Error('encampment jump did not zoom the map: --zoom=' + z); if (!document.querySelector('[data-testid=block-pulse]')) throw new Error('block-jump pulse missing'); })()
